source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Seborrheic Dermatitis
source.population: Infants, adolescents, and adults with suspected or clinician-diagnosed seborrheic dermatitis, with differential and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: DHA-licensed telehealth assessment with face-to-face or dermatology referral where indicated.
source.exclusions: Direct for selected seborrheic-dermatitis symptoms, distribution, appearance, red flags, differential testing, and documentation-only management fields. Diagnosis, medicine choice, dose, treatment instruction, referral urgency, and fixed follow-up remain clinician responsibilities.
